outlook.volatilityExpectation: Mixed regime: 0DTE stability (+7.97B GEX) conflicts with negative Weekly/Monthly GEX (-10.67B combined). Expect calm short-term with volatility spike risk on breakdown below 6500.
outlook.summary: Market trapped in a gamma tug-of-war. 0DTE shows bullish reverse-smirk skew with dealer long gamma suppressing volatility, while Weekly/Monthly exhibit bearish smirk with heavy put demand (PCR 2.18-2.80). The 6800 level acts as magnetic ceiling across ALL expiries. Unusual volume at 6500 PUT (115k vol vs 10k OI = 11.5x ratio) signals institutional hedging. Price pinned between 6540-6650 near-term with 6800 as MM target.

Critical support at 24000 MONTHLY PUT WALL (1958 OI). Extreme unusual activity detected at 23700 (VOL/OI 7.4x). Positive 0DTE gamma supports stability; negative weekly/monthly GEX warns of volatility if support breaks.
